title: decode_html_entities missing numeric entities and
description: decode_html_entities() in src/cards.rs handles only 7 named entities (& < > " ' ' '). Missing:   (very common), all numeric decimal entities like ’ (right single quote),   (non-breaking space), and arbitrary &#xHHHH; hex entities beyond the hardcoded '. Real-world OG tags from major publishers (NYT, WaPo, Medium) frequently contain these. Users will see literal entity text in card titles/descriptions. Fix: use a proper entity decoder (htmlescape crate or implement decimal/hex numeric entity parsing via regex).
